allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\('/tmp/tfmv_tree.json'\) as f: data = json.load\(f\) paths = [t['path'] for t in data.get\('tree', []\)] print\(f'Total tracked entries: {len\(paths\)}'\) print\(f'Truncated: {data.get\(\\"truncated\\", False\)}'\) print\(\) print\('=== Top-level files/folders ==='\) top = sorted\(set\(p.split\('/'\)[0] for p in paths\)\) for t in top: print\(' ', t\) ")
